# Coverdrive

> Coverdrive turns any GitHub profile into a World-XI-style cricket scouting
> report: a rated shield card out of 99, attributes, earned playstyle badges,
> a Cricinfo-style career-statistics table, and a commit contribution heatmap.
> A cricket-themed take on GitFut — same idea, different sport.

Coverdrive is a free, open-source web app. Enter any GitHub username on the
home page and it produces a shareable cricket card and full scouting report
for that developer. Cards can be exported as PNG images (including a story
format) and shared to X or LinkedIn.

## How it works

- All GitHub data is fetched through a Node.js/Express server with caching
  and optional token auth, so browsers never hit GitHub's unauthenticated
  rate limits.
- A rating engine converts GitHub activity (repos, stars, commits, languages,
  contribution history) into cricket-style attributes and an overall rating
  out of 99.
- Player pages live at /player/:username and are rendered client-side with
  React.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://gitcoverdrive.onrender.com/): search any GitHub username to
  get scouted.
- [Player report](https://gitcoverdrive.onrender.com/player/iamkurubaran):
  example scouting report (replace the username with any GitHub handle).

## Project

- [Source code](https://github.com/iamkurubaran/Coverdrive): MIT-style open
  source; client (React + Vite), server (Node.js + Express), plus desktop,
  mobile, and browser-extension companions.
- [Author](https://github.com/iamkurubaran): iamkurubaran.
